sentence_reviews.text: CUDA, ROCm, Triton, and custom kernels map tensor operations onto accelerator threads, memory tiles, vector units, and communication primitives.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: CUDA and ROCm documentation support mapping computation to accelerator execution units and memory spaces; Triton/custom-kernel wording is not directly cited.
sentence_reviews.notes: Definition is technically defensible, but exact CUDA+ROCm+Triton coverage would need a Triton source.

sentence_reviews.text: combined with GPUs, TPUs & AI accelerators
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: Reviewed as synthesis across cited source pointers and, where applicable, the canonical atlas graph context.
sentence_reviews.notes: Former ambiguity resolved by narrowing the audit interpretation to synthesis support rather than requiring exact-source wording.

sentence_reviews.text: Operational gains introduce new failure modes in concurrency, versioning, security, numerical behavior, observability, and cost. Its direct dependencies include GPUs, TPUs & AI accelerators, Algorithms & data structures.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: Synthesized from cited node sources plus the atlas dependency context in data/atlas.json.
sentence_reviews.notes: Limitation is reviewed as a broad synthesis/tradeoff statement for the family-level node, not as a direct quotation from one source.

sentence_reviews.text: In this atlas graph, CUDA, ROCm, Triton & custom kernels is modeled as depending on GPUs, TPUs & AI accelerators, Algorithms & data structures and feeding downstream nodes such as Graph compilers, runtimes & operator fusion.
